subject: english
title: Unit 9 Grammar 1 — Force Lab Test
subtitle: 12 tabs, Leo tests double comparatives: flashcards, warm up, the rule, detective, build it, sort, practice, survey, word web, guess the ending, scored quiz, Dribble! soccer round.

content: Test what Leo learned about cause and effect with double comparatives.
Build and fix double-comparative sentences, sort and match practice items.
language: Recall vocabulary: describe, match, merry-go-round, seesaw, skateboarder.
Apply the patterns: the more..., the more... / the more..., the -er...
Change adjectives into their comparative form (good → better).

referenceLinks.label: Cause and effect with double comparatives
